nodes.context: General term for various Albanian criminal organizations active in the US and EU, involved in drug, arms, and human trafficking.
Kosovo Albanian paramilitary organization that fought for independence; alleged ties to organized crime.

edges.evidence_quote: La naturaleza de la relación entre el grupo terrorista Ejército de Liberación de Kosovo (UÇK) y el crimen organizado albanés ha sido un tema controvertido.
edges.context: The text discusses a controversial relationship between the Albanian mafia and the Kosovo Liberation Army, with allegations that the UÇK was financed by criminal networks.
